sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ صُوَرًا بَلَاغِيَّةً رَائِعَةً.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik koristi divne retoričke slike.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language uses wonderful rhetorical images.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا نَقُولُ "الْوَقْتُ مِن ذَهَبٍ"، فَنَحْنُ نَصِفُ قِيمَتَهُ الْعَالِيَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kada kažemo "vrijeme je zlato", opisujemo njegovu veliku vrijednost.
sentences.translationEn: When we say "time is gold," we are describing its high value.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِاسْتِعَارَاتُ تَجْعَلُ الْكَلَامَ أَجْمَلَ وَأَوْضَحَ.
sentences.translation: Ove metafore čine govor ljepšim i jasnijim.
sentences.translationEn: These metaphors make speech more beautiful and clearer.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمْتِعُ الْقَارِئُ بِفَهْمِ الْمَعَانِي الْعَمِيقَةِ خَلْفَ الْكَلِمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Čitalac uživa u razumijevanju dubokih značenja iza riječi.
sentences.translationEn: The reader enjoys understanding the deep meanings behind the words.

sentences.arabic: الْبَلَاغَةُ هِيَ سِرُّ جَمَالِ النَّثْرِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Retorika je tajna ljepote arapske proze.
sentences.translationEn: Eloquence is the secret of the beauty of Arabic prose.
